ogTitle: Maryvale vs Matta Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Maryvale vs Matta Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maryvale, South Australia and Matta Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Matta Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Maryvale (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maryvale or Matta Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maryvale has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Matta Flat scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maryvale scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Matta Flat scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maryvale or Matta Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Matta Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
